title: senecio deferens
intro: Senecio deferens, also known as groundsel, is a biennial or perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Groundsel is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Groundsel can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its expectorant and antispasmodic properties.
